## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Understory and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, blog development, and tool integration.](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog design approved; content creation to begin while backend integration is in progress](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [New managing editor (Katya) joining to lead expert-led content creation](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Two-pronged content strategy: high-volume keywords for authority building + expert-led content for targeted engagement](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Understory to provide list of tools used for integration into content and potential programmatic SEO play](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)

## Topics

### Blog Development and Content Strategy

  - [Blog design approved; backend integration with WordPress in progress](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Content creation starting immediately to prepare for blog launch](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Two-pronged content strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
    1.  High-volume keywords for authority building (e.g., "all-bound marketing")
    2.  Lower-volume, expert-led content for targeted engagement
  - [New managing editor (Katya) joining to lead expert-led content creation](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic SEO opportunities based on Understory's tool usage](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)

### Content Refinement and AI Integration

  - [Removing AI-like language (e.g., "revolutionize," question-answer format, em dashes)](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Alternating authorship between Ali and Alex for broader reach](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Incorporating tools used by Understory (e.g., InstaLink, HayReach) into content](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Feedback on articles to be fed into AI engine for improved future drafts](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)

### Expanding Content Sources

  - [Leveraging Understory team members for quotes and expertise (e.g., Anna for paid social, Chris for paid search)](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Potential collaborations with tool partners (e.g., Nick from HayReach)](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [Utilizing podcast transcripts (15+ episodes) for additional content and blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [Baseline metrics established using Scrunch for tracking progress over time](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [Prompt list prepared for ongoing performance monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Understory to review and provide feedback on the all-bound marketing article draft](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
  - [Alex to share ClickUp SOPs containing tool list and descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Sydney to set up a "Tools We Use" table in the shared platform](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin scraping podcast transcripts for content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Katya to start planning expert-led content and deep dives with Understory team](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Continue developing content and preparing for blog launch](https://fathom.video/share/YU9DbBgN_vZpMJ-ANU6gd1bx1rkwtDsa?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
